statement.markdown: Given an empty queue, implement the 'dequeue' operation. The operation should remove the front element from the queue.
statement.outputFormat: Queue elements after dequeue operation, separated by space
statement.notes: The input queue is not empty.

examples.explanation: The front element is 1, so the queue is dequeued.

hints.text: Check the implementation of the dequeue operation.

editorial.title: Correct Broken Queue Dequeue
editorial.intuition: Dequeue operation should be implemented based on the queue data structure.
editorial.bruteForce: Brute force approach summary: iterate over the queue and remove elements one by one.
editorial.optimalSolution: Optimal solution details: maintain a pointer to the front element and remove it when dequeued.
editorial.proofOfCorrectness: Correctness proof: the queue should be updated correctly after dequeue operation.
commonMistakes: Removing the last element, not the front element.
